exports.name: EventId
exports.purpose: Identify one event consistently across content sources and application journeys.

exports.name: EventSchedule
exports.signature: export interface EventSchedule { startsAt: string; endsAt?: string }
exports.purpose: Represent the portable start and optional end values for an event.

exports.name: Event
exports.signature: export interface Event { id: EventId; title: string; category: string; location: string; schedule: EventSchedule; description: string; attendanceInfo: string }
exports.purpose: Provide the canonical visitor-facing event record independent of storage format.

exports.name: EventQuery
exports.signature: export interface EventQuery { category?: string; location?: string }
exports.purpose: Express optional category and location criteria for read-only discovery.

exports.name: EventValidationIssue
exports.signature: export interface EventValidationIssue { recordIndex: number; reasons: readonly string[] }
exports.purpose: Identify an invalid source record and explain why it was rejected.

exports.name: EventSourceSnapshot
exports.signature: export interface EventSourceSnapshot { events: readonly Event[]; issues: readonly EventValidationIssue[] }
exports.purpose: Return valid normalized events alongside explicit source validation issues.

exports.name: EventSource
exports.purpose: Define the replaceable asynchronous boundary implemented by JSON, localStorage, Firestore, or another event source.

exports.name: EventCatalogResult
exports.signature: export interface EventCatalogResult { events: readonly Event[]; issues: readonly EventValidationIssue[] }
exports.purpose: Return query results without discarding source validation information.

exports.name: EventCatalog
exports.signature: export interface EventCatalog { list(query?: EventQuery): Promise<EventCatalogResult>; findById(id: EventId): Promise<Event | null> }
exports.purpose: Provide the complete read-only catalog contract consumed by the application.

exports.name: createEventCatalog
exports.signature: export declare function createEventCatalog(source: EventSource): EventCatalog
exports.purpose: Create catalog behavior around any conforming content source.

exports.name: createJsonEventSource
exports.signature: export declare function createJsonEventSource(records: readonly unknown[]): EventSource
exports.purpose: Validate and normalize bundled JSON records behind the replaceable EventSource boundary.

exports.name: eventCatalog
exports.purpose: Expose the configured read-only catalog without revealing the active JSON source to React consumers.
